================================================================================
weird name
================================================================================

message message {}

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

parseTree = [
  {kind: BOF},
    {kind: message},
    {kind: message},
    {kind: {},
  {kind: }, subtreeSize: 4},
  {kind: EOF},
]

================================================================================
weird name
================================================================================

message Test {}

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

parseTree = [
  {kind: BOF},
    {kind: message},
    {kind: Identifier},
    {kind: {},
  {kind: }, subtreeSize: 4},
  {kind: EOF},
]

================================================================================
empty statement
================================================================================

message Test { ; }

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

parseTree = [
  {kind: BOF},
    {kind: message},
    {kind: Identifier},
    {kind: {},
  {kind: }, subtreeSize: 4},
  {kind: EOF},
]

================================================================================
option
================================================================================

message Test { option deprecated = true; }

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

parseTree = [
  {kind: BOF},
    {kind: message},
    {kind: Identifier},
    {kind: {},
      {kind: option},
        {kind: Identifier},
        {kind: true},
      {kind: =, subtreeSize: 3},
    {kind: ;, subtreeSize: 5},
  {kind: }, subtreeSize: 9},
  {kind: EOF},
]

================================================================================
options
================================================================================

message Test { option deprecated = true; option test = true; }

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

parseTree = [
  {kind: BOF},
    {kind: message},
    {kind: Identifier},
    {kind: {},
      {kind: option},
        {kind: Identifier},
        {kind: true},
      {kind: =, subtreeSize: 3},
    {kind: ;, subtreeSize: 5},
      {kind: option},
        {kind: Identifier},
        {kind: true},
      {kind: =, subtreeSize: 3},
    {kind: ;, subtreeSize: 5},
  {kind: }, subtreeSize: 14},
  {kind: EOF},
]

================================================================================
field
================================================================================

message Test { uint32 id = 1; }

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

parseTree = [
  {kind: BOF},
    {kind: message},
    {kind: Identifier},
    {kind: {},
      {kind: uint32},
        {kind: Identifier},
        {kind: Integer},
      {kind: =, subtreeSize: 3},
    {kind: ;, subtreeSize: 5},
  {kind: }, subtreeSize: 9},
  {kind: EOF},
]

================================================================================
fields
================================================================================

message Test { uint32 id = 1; float height = 2; }

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

parseTree = [
  {kind: BOF},
    {kind: message},
    {kind: Identifier},
    {kind: {},
      {kind: uint32},
        {kind: Identifier},
        {kind: Integer},
      {kind: =, subtreeSize: 3},
    {kind: ;, subtreeSize: 5},
      {kind: float},
        {kind: Identifier},
        {kind: Integer},
      {kind: =, subtreeSize: 3},
    {kind: ;, subtreeSize: 5},
  {kind: }, subtreeSize: 14},
  {kind: EOF},
]

================================================================================
fields various names
================================================================================

message test {
  Bar msg = 1;
  Foo.Bar inner_msg = 2;
  true.Bar test = 3;
  true uint32 = 4;
}

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

parseTree = [
  {kind: BOF},
    {kind: message},
    {kind: Identifier},
            {kind: {},
              {kind: Identifier},
              {kind: Identifier},
              {kind: Integer},
            {kind: =, subtreeSize: 4},
          {kind: ;, subtreeSize: 6},
              {kind: Identifier},
              {kind: Identifier},
            {kind: ., subtreeSize: 3},
            {kind: Identifier},
            {kind: Integer},
          {kind: =, subtreeSize: 6},
        {kind: ;, subtreeSize: 8},
            {kind: true},
            {kind: Identifier},
          {kind: ., subtreeSize: 3},
          {kind: Identifier},
          {kind: Integer},
        {kind: =, subtreeSize: 6},
      {kind: ;, subtreeSize: 8},
        {kind: true},
        {kind: uint32},
        {kind: Integer},
      {kind: =, subtreeSize: 4},
    {kind: ;, subtreeSize: 6},
  {kind: }, subtreeSize: 28},
  {kind: EOF},
]
